transcript: attend physical education class. Sam and others pretended to be in it, too, and the monster had already discovered them. She had to swallow her breath for snacks. Night. Sam is trying to uncover the truth of the matter. Call on your friend and sneak into the teacher's house. The three have just arrived in the courtyard. Monster pulls open the curtains. Open your watery eyes and clear them. Staring at the moon in the sky. And then there was a strange roar coming out of his mouth. Xiaoming, who was frightened, made a sound. The monster instantly stopped roaring. Staring at the three with with terrifying eyes they didn't have time to leave can only hide behind the yard unexpectedly a few people even entered the room discovering the previous teacher leaning against the wall no matter how you call you can't respond and the monster has already arrived in the living room the three of them had to hide behind the sofa little did they know that the monster had already discovered them it deliberately deliberately pretended to leave, leading out a few people. The three of them were indeed deceived.
